29.reason: [The scanf function expects the address of the variable to store the input, but st[len++] is the value at that index, not its address. It should be &st[len++].]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The scanf function expects the address of the variable to store the input, but st[len++] is the value at that index, not its address. It should be &st[len++].]
